problem_context.expected_behavior: Return null exactly on the empty sequence, else the first node, preserving all resources.

reference_case_hints: Strictly follow separation-predicate style of QCP_demos_LLM singly-linked-list examples; adapt it to bidirectional circular sentinel lists.
spec_hint: Model both next and prev links and sentinel ownership.
